title: Hybrid (NOT FULL) automated trading bot's performance
author: No_Page5992
selftext:
Hey everyone,

A while ago I started posting about building a trading system that doesn't remove the human from the game. But instead our focus went to create a 'hybrid' bot, which simply reinforces the human, not actually removing it.

Here's a quick update:

We've been running many tests since my first post about this, and will continue doing so for a long while.  
Why?   
Because this tool is extremely versatile, with the settings it has, it can be adjusted for basically any preference.  
  
Whether you are a complete beginner or a very advanced trader.  
A beginner would use a very safe way of the bot simply to get the hangs of it and learn how to trade, especially with the bot.

A advanced trader would use a very aggressive way of use on the bot in order to achieve the highest possible ROI.

Instead of over-explaining, I now have shared a snippet of LIVE trade history.  
And the review of our very first client.

For context, this man is also a beginner trader.

Few important notes:  
  
\- This is NOT a fully automated trading bot.  
\- The user only decides what parameter sets he'd like to use (given by us)  
They can choose whatever they'd like within our exclusive server.  
\- Results depend on that specific decision.

Because this tool/bot is user-related, we do a serious amount in order to give the support to anyone who needs it using this product.  
Live calls, explanations, manuals, onboarding, server.. Basically anything so people will achieve the best results possible.  
Also because I think the trading industry absolutely lacks when we talk about support.

The biggest issue in trading is not really strategy, but execution in my opinion.  
When that part is structured, results become much more consistent first of all, and will become profitable after.

I'm trying to not over-explain everything here, so if you're curious about how it works specifically, or want to see more in detail feel free to reach out, or ask here!

Happy to answer anything.

PS:  
If this feels suspicious to anyone, before commenting.. Please reach out and I'll be able to showcase anything.  
Results, but also chats of our server, with real users.  
Thank ya'll!

comments.author: AdmitsOnly
comments.body: Wondering how you got this to work from an API standpoint. I tried to set up a trade bot on coinbase (manly vibe codes), and it worked for a few trades until it broke. Working through a command prompt window was so bizarre

replies.body:
This tool has been created on Ctrader, which has already a built-in language for this purpose, or indicator creation.

This might answer your question, anything deeper related I couldn't answer unfortunately as I have my development team for such.
I do not code myself.

comments.author: Denis_Kurilchik
comments.body:
Hybrid makes a lot of sense for early stages. Full auto assumes the strategy is more robust than it usually is out of the gate, so keeping the human confirm layer limits damage when the model's wrong.

If youre thinking about making this verifiable to others beyond your own PnL screenshots, crypto protocol setups handle that differently. On-chain execution > backtest screenshots. The thinking behind BoBe's Gamma Protocol was similar, every distribution on-chain so anyone can check rather than just trust the numbers.

replies.author: No_Page5992
replies.body:
I think you misunderstood the whole concept here.

This is not a matter of having a robust model or not.

We believe that the highest ROI can be achieved when operated by human.

Also, having a hybrid model allows us to actually sell this product, which we wouldn't do with a automated bot.

Nevertheless this bot is meant to be used as an tool.
No execution needed anymore by the user, the part where most fail.

Also, we do not do crypto..

comments.author: nicoloboschi
comments.body: The focus on execution over strategy is spot on; consistent execution is often the real differentiator. As you explore system improvements, you might find a dedicated memory layer helpful for tracking and recalling key decision points; a system like Hindsight could be useful. [https://github.com/vectorize-io/hindsight](https://github.com/vectorize-io/hindsight)
